title: ChaTweaks
body:
# ChaTweaks
A client-side mod enhancing your chat, (soon to be) packed with many useful features

## How to use
### Configuration
To configure the mod, you can execute the `/chatweaks config` command (or click on the config in ModMenu), from there you can configure all of the features to your needs.
### How to use the morsing feature
To enable/disable automatic translation of incoming chat messages, use the `Y` or `Z` keybind, depending on your keyboard layout, or use `/chatweaks morseCodeTranslation <enable|disable|toggle>`.

To send a message in morse code, use the `/chatweaks morse <message>`. This will automatically translate your message into morse code and send it.

**NOTE:** If you have a mod/client utilizing dot-commands like meteor client or asteroid installed, you might need to change your command prefix to something other than `.`, else those clients/mods will likely think that you want to execute a command

## Features
- Highly configurable prefix & suffix
- Regex Chat filtering
- Type in morse code and decrypt other messages in morse code
- [to be added] Anti spam (collapse multiple of the same message into one)

### Request Features
Found a feature missing that should be added? Don't hesitate to make an issue or PR on the GitHub!
